title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 20 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures moved sideways today, with the most-traded DCE I2609 contract closing at 758 yuan/mt, edging down 0.39%from yesterday's closing price. Spot prices fell by 0-5 yuan/mt in tandem; traders sold based on market conditions; steel mills purchased as needed, and overall market trading sentiment on Monday was subdued. Supply side, total global iron ore shipments tracked by SMM last week reached 30.98 million mt, up 2% WoW, with cumulative growth of 1% YoY.
